no_permission: You do not have permission to use this feature
no_access: You do not have access to this interaction
grade_not_allowed: Your grade is not allowed to use this interaction
inventory_full: You do not have room in your inventory
not_enough_items: You do not have the required items
confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete %s? This action is irreversible.
entity_name_desc: In English, no spaces, no accents (e.g. sheriff, baker)
entity_label_desc: The name shown in-game (e.g. Sheriff, Baker)
name_error_spaces: The name must not contain spaces! Use underscores (_)
name_error_chars: The name may only contain lowercase letters, digits and underscores
name_error_short: The name must be at least 2 characters
name_error_long: The name must not exceed 50 characters
name_error_number: The name must not start with a digit
too_far: You are too far from this interaction point
phone_number_exists: This number is already in use
ui_settings_progress_provider_hint: Auto = pick the best available. Otherwise force a specific impl (ox_lib, vorp, or native).
ui_settings_placement_mode_hint: Raycast = mouse pointing (wheel rotation, left click). Gizmo = entity spawned in front of you, manipulated via 3D gizmo ([W] translate, [R] rotate, [Backspace] confirm). Requires jo_libs.
ui_settings_provider_missing: {name} is not enabled. Uncomment the matching line in fxmanifest.lua and restart the resource.
ui_settings_jo_libs_manifest_required: jo_libs needs the jo_libs NUI page: in fxmanifest.lua, uncomment ui_page 'nui://jo_libs/nui/index.html', comment ui_page 'web/build/index.html', uncomment '@jo_libs/init.lua' and jo_libs { 'menu', 'input' }, then restart the resource.
ui_settings_vorp_lib_manifest_required: vorp_lib progress needs its import in fxmanifest.lua: uncomment '@vorp_lib/import.lua' in shared_scripts, make sure vorp_lib is started, then restart this resource.
phone_already_in_call: You are already on a call
phone_delete_contact_desc: Remove this contact from the list
phone_distance_warning: You are moving away from the phone
phone_distance_disconnect: Too far from the phone, call dropped
police_alert_desc: Send an alert to law enforcement
paycheck_no_funds: The company does not have enough funds to pay your salary
paycheck_gang_no_funds: The gang does not have enough funds to pay your salary
item_name_desc: English, lowercase, no spaces or accents (e.g. golden_ring, bread_loaf)
item_label_desc: The name shown in-game (e.g. Golden Ring, Bread Loaf)
dispatch_stop_all_hint: Stop all active sonar GPS pings
shop_add_stock_desc: Transfer from your inventory to the shop
shop_take_stock_desc: Remove stock from the shop to your inventory
shop_no_item_in_inv: You don't have this item in your inventory
shop_not_owner: You are not the owner of this shop
nui_open_map_hint: Open the map (M) and place a waypoint
nui_waypoint_timeout: No waypoint placed within the time limit
ui_int_text3d_enable: 3D Text (display the label above the point)
ui_int_delivery_vehicle: Required vehicle (model, leave empty for none)
ui_int_delivery_items_hint: Items required in the player's inventory at start, consumed on delivery
ui_int_delivery_rewards_hint: Items or currencies received by the player on delivery (e.g. dollars, gold, or any item)
ui_int_teleport_loading_hint: If load time > 0, a black screen is shown with the title and message for that duration.
ui_int_force_menu: Always open the menu (even with a single item)
ui_int_force_menu_hint: Useful for crafting (shows ingredients) or to let the player confirm. If unchecked and only one item, the action runs directly from the prompt.
ui_int_delivery_vehicle_spawn_hint: Coordinates and heading where the vehicle will appear. Leave 0,0,0 to spawn next to the player, or use Place then the mouse wheel to rotate the preview.
ui_int_limit_police_no_jobs: No job created yet. Create a job first to add it to the alerts list.
vehicle_spawn_point: Face the desired spawn point and press ENTER
ui_entity_regions_hint: Filters dispatch alerts received by this job. Empty = all regions.
ui_grade_subtitle: Define grades, salaries and boss permissions
ui_grade_is_boss_hint: Access to boss menu and money management
ui_grade_delete_message: Delete grade {name}? Players will keep their grade until next change.
ui_int_prompt_distance_hint: Max distance at which the prompt OR the ox_target zone activates. Empty or 0 = 1.0 default. Raise it for far-reach interactions (otherwise ox_target lets you interact from 50m).
ui_int_capture_waiting_message: Go to the location in-game and type the command
ui_int_delete_message: This action is irreversible. The interaction will be removed from the map for all players.
ui_int_list_subtitle: Interaction points on the map for this {type}
ui_int_limit_scope_hint: Choose if the limit applies per player or globally for the entire server.
ui_int_limit_police_message_hint: Text shown to law enforcement when triggered
ui_int_limit_police_jobs_hint: Comma-separated job names. Leave empty for all LEO/medic types.
ui_int_external_label_hint: The label shown on the target is configured in the General → Label tab.
ui_int_external_options_count: {count} option(s) enabled. Checked options are passed to the resource on trigger.
ui_int_external_no_options: No options configured by the resource. The trigger calls the event directly.
ui_item_removable_hint: Player can drop or give it
ui_item_image_url_hint: Direct link to a .png image only
ui_item_image_url_invalid: URL must point to a .png image
ui_item_error_required: Technical name and label are required
ui_item_error_format: Name must be lowercase, digits and underscores only
ui_public_subtitle: Available to all players regardless of job/gang
ui_combobox_more: Refine your search to see more
ui_name_lower_format: Name must contain only lowercase letters and underscores
ui_type_lower_format: Type must contain only lowercase letters and underscores
ui_type_grouping_hint: Type groups jobs/gangs together (e.g. all 'leo' count as police).
ui_already_exists_job: A job with this name already exists
ui_already_exists_gang: A gang with this name already exists
ui_int_grade_unrestricted: Open access — all grades can use this point.
ui_int_grade_restricted: Restricted — only checked grades are allowed.
ui_int_inspection_subtitle: Interaction inspection · JSON structure stored in DB
ui_int_instance_hint: Opens the store/wardrobe in a private instance (jo_clothingstore only — ignored by other clothing resources).
ui_int_phone_number_hint: Must be unique on the server
ui_place_instructions: Click to place • Mouse wheel to rotate • Escape to cancel
ui_peds_empty: No peds. Create one with the button above.
ui_peds_scenario_hint: E.g. WORLD_HUMAN_SMOKE. If empty, tries the animation below.
ui_peds_animation_hint: Optional — loops if no scenario is set.
ui_vehicles_empty: No custom vehicle. Create one with the button above.
ui_vehicles_empty_jobs: No job has a garage configured.
ui_vehicles_empty_gangs: No gang has a garage configured.
ui_vehicles_empty_public: No public action has a garage configured.
ui_vehicles_delete_message: This custom vehicle will be removed.
ui_horses_empty_jobs: No job has a stable configured.
ui_horses_empty_gangs: No gang has a stable configured.
ui_horses_empty_public: No public action has a stable configured.
ui_horses_empty: No custom horse. Create one with the button above.
ui_horses_saddle_hint: The horse spawns tacked up (like a mount)
ui_horses_delete_message: This custom horse will be removed.
ui_settings_subtitle: Configure the admin interface and player menu behaviour
ui_markers_subtitle: All ground markers used across jobs, gangs and public points
ui_props_subtitle: All props placed across jobs, gangs and public points
ui_templates_subtitle: Install pre-made configurations in one click
ui_backup_subtitle: Backup and restore your jobs/gangs/items configuration
ui_backup_create_hint: Captures current state of all jobs, gangs, interactions and items
ui_backup_import_hint: Restore from an exported JSON file
ui_backup_confirm_restore: Restoring this backup will overwrite the current configuration. Continue?
ui_backup_warning_message: Restoring replaces ALL current data. Create a manual backup right before if possible.
ui_settings_accent_hint: Primary color for buttons and highlights
ui_settings_panel_opacity_hint: Lets you see the game behind
ui_settings_show_hotkeys_hint: Show Ctrl+K and other shortcuts in the UI
ui_settings_item_notifications_hint: Display a slot at the center of the screen when you gain or lose an item
ui_settings_item_text_notifications_hint: Display a text message (ox_lib / vorp) in addition to the slot when you gain or lose an item
ui_settings_webhooks_hint: Discord webhook URLs to log actions by category. Leave empty to disable.
ui_serverconfig_subtitle: Edit live config sections persisted in database
ui_serverconfig_entity_hint: Types assignable to a job (e.g. leo, medic). Used in Actions (allowedTypes) and to categorize jobs.
ui_serverconfig_interaction_icon_hint: Icons = FontAwesome classes for ox_lib only. Ignored in vorp_menu.
ui_serverconfig_action_hint: Actions available in the in-game action menu. featureKey = Features key to enable/disable.
ui_entity_actions_hint: Select the actions this job can use. Configured globally in Server config > Actions.
ui_entity_actions_empty: No action configured. Create some in Server config > Actions.
ui_entity_debug_hint: Full entity JSON structure, copyable for sharing or debugging.
ui_public_nearest_hint: Sort by distance from your position
ui_serverconfig_reset_hint: Removes the saved override (requires resource restart)
ui_serverconfig_paycheck_pay_in_bank_hin: Off = paid in cash (dollars on the character). On = deposited via the banking resource/export below.
ui_serverconfig_paycheck_government_hint: Comma-separated list. These types are paid by the state, not by a company account.
ui_serverconfig_permissions_groups_label: VORP groups allowed to open the panel
ui_serverconfig_permissions_groups_hint: Any player whose VORP group matches one of these can open the admin panel.
ui_serverconfig_permissions_buttons_hint: Set the allowed groups for each section. Leave empty to inherit the global panel groups above.
ui_serverconfig_permissions_buttons_empt: Empty = uses the admin panel groups
delivery_too_far: You are too far from the destination
delivery_wrong_vehicle: You are not in the correct vehicle
delivery_already_active: A delivery is already in progress
ui_blips_empty_custom: No custom blip yet. Create one with the button above.
ui_blips_empty_jobs: No job has a blip configured on its interactions.
ui_blips_empty_gangs: No gang has a blip configured on its interactions.
ui_blips_empty_public: No public action has a blip configured.
ui_blips_delete_message: This blip will be removed from the map for all players.
ui_peds_empty_jobs: No job has a ped configured on its interactions.
ui_peds_empty_gangs: No gang has a ped configured on its interactions.
ui_peds_empty_public: No public action has a ped configured.
ui_entity_type_hint: Type groups jobs/gangs together (e.g. all "leo" count as police).
no_interaction_near: No interaction found in front of you (%sm)
usable_horse_required: You must be mounted on a horse to use this.
usable_in_combat: Not in the middle of combat.
ui_item_usable_config_hint: Behavior when the player clicks 'Use' from their inventory. Anim, prop, stat modifiers, screen FX. All fields are optional.
ui_item_consumable_hint: Checked: player eats/drinks/injects it (animation + removal + effects). Unchecked: the item just fires a script (notepad, radio, lockpick...) and stays in the inventory.
ui_item_trigger_only_hint: The item won't be removed and no animation runs. Every use calls the OnUsableItemTrigger hook on the client (and OnUsableItemTriggerServer on the server). Wire it in modules/editable/.
ui_item_use_type_hint: Decides whether the item is consumed in one shot or progressively with a remaining %%.
ui_item_use_prop_hint: In-hand model. Pick from the list or extend it in data/usables.lua.
ui_item_use_anim_preset_hint: Pick a tested dict/anim combo, or leave empty and fill the custom fields below.
ui_item_use_screen_fx_hint: You can stack multiple effects. ★ = preset (fx + timecycle), otherwise individual animpostfx.
ui_item_use_horse_boost_hint: The overpower boost (boostHealth/boostStamina) stays editable via DB for advanced cases.
ui_item_give_subtitle: Adds the item to a connected player's inventory
ui_item_give_target_hint: Server ID (visible in the player list)
ui_item_give_target_hint_self: Server ID of the receiver. Leave empty or 0 to give it to yourself.
tpl_sheriff_basic_card_desc: Town law with 5 ranks, jail, armory, dispatch and cells
tpl_medic_basic_card_desc: Medical team: doctor / nurse / paramedic, pharmacy, treatments
tpl_saloon_basic_card_desc: Bartender, waitress, manager + alcohol crafting, drinks, music stage
tpl_blacksmith_card_desc: Apprentice, craftsman, master + craft weapons, tools, horseshoes
tpl_farmer_card_desc: Grain harvest, flour milling, crop sales, livestock
tpl_cheminot_card_desc: Driver, conductor, station master + train deliveries, stations
tpl_banker_card_desc: Teller, loan officer, director + safes, loans, exchange
broken_ped_warning_sub: Change the model from the panel
broken_ped_panel_warning: Some PED models are incompatible with the RedM engine and disappear a few seconds after spawning. If a placed ped doesn't show up, try a different model.
broken_ped_panel_flagged: This model has been flagged as incompatible — pick another one.
broken_ped_notify: PED model %s is incompatible — it vanished, pick a different one from the panel.
ui_entity_name_invalid_chars: The name may only contain lowercase letters and underscores
ui_entity_type_invalid_chars: The type may only contain lowercase letters and underscores
